_publications._publicationTitle: The haploinsufficient hematopoietic microenvironment is critical to the pathological fracture repair in murine models of neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: When trabecular bone of 16-week old mice were evaluated using micro-computed tomography (μCT), the bone volume (BV/TV) was similar in WT, Nf1+/−, and PeriCre mice
details: Effectively measured trabecular bone volume showing 23% reduction in PeriCre mice and 16% reduction in Nf1+/− mice
